name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate senior SDE interview scripts and Excalidraw script cards with blue decision flows from technical excerpts.

interface.shortDescription: SDE scripts plus Excalidraw decision cards.
interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into Chinese-first senior SDE speaking scripts, then export an Excalidraw script card with blue decision-flow boxes when tools are available.
defaultPrompt: Create a senior SDE answer and Excalidraw script card.
Turn this excerpt into a 90-120 second interview answer.
Draw an Excalidraw card with a blue decision flow.
